conditions.analyte_polymer: PIB-diol, PIB-diallyl, PIB-monool, PIB-dichloride, PIB-diolefin, PIBOL014
conditions.evidence_text: The critical solvent composition for PIB was established as THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w). ... LCCC chromatograms of PIB samples of different functionality but similar MW ... under critical condition using RI detector ... THF/methanol 80.5/19.5 (w/w).
conditions.notes: The text explicitly states this composition allows separation based on chemical functionality independent of MW. The RI detector was used for quantitative analysis.
